description: Report that recovery has been exhausted for a conversation

main.description: Report that a client has exhausted all recovery attempts for a conversation. Any member may report. When votes from at least ceil(2/3) of the active identity DIDs carry a valid epoch_authenticator within the 1-hour expiry window, the server auto-resets the group (see ADR-002).

failureType.description: Type of failure that was exhausted

failureMode.description: Per ADR-008 D1: distinguishes local state loss (Mode A) from group state unrecoverable (Mode B). Only Mode B reports SHOULD count toward server-side quorum auto-reset; Mode A reports indicate that this client lost local state and should self-heal via §6.6 / §8.4 External Commit + self-Remove rather than triggering a global reset. Optional during interim deployment; servers that don't yet enforce the distinction MUST count any vote that satisfies the §8.6 / ADR-002 invariants.

epochAuthenticator.description: Hex-encoded epoch_authenticator (RFC 9420 §8.7) for the reporter's current epoch. Optional at the schema layer but REQUIRED for the report to count toward quorum auto-reset. Clients that omit this field will have their report accepted (HTTP 200) with reason="missing_authenticator" but not counted.

recorded.description: Whether the failure report was recorded as a counted quorum vote

autoResetTriggered.description: Whether the quorum threshold was met and an automatic group reset was triggered

failureCount.description: Number of distinct identity DIDs whose full active device set has filed valid votes within the expiry window

memberCount.description: Total number of distinct identity DIDs in the conversation's active member roster

reason.description: Discriminator for why the vote was not counted (if any). Omitted on a successful vote.

newGroupId.description: When autoResetTriggered is true, the new group_id assigned to the conversation. Clients can begin rejoining under this identifier immediately without polling.

resetGeneration.description: When autoResetTriggered is true, the lifetime reset_count after this reset. Matches the resetGeneration on the GroupResetEvent SSE event for this same reset.

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: Caller is not a member of the conversation
